name: content-stack
description: Repo-agnostic SEO content operations for Codex, backed by the local content-stack daemon.

interface.shortDescription: Manage SEO content pipelines from any website repo.
interface.longDescription: Run content-stack procedures from the current repository while the singleton local daemon owns projects, credentials, runs, and publishing audit trails.
defaultPrompt: Use content-stack to connect this repository to a project.
Use content-stack to run the next SEO content procedure from this repo.
